推荐场景: 办公室走廊｜判断问题原因和结果
60秒任务: 「原因和结果」：故事顺序/原因/感受；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: 叙事｜时间顺序｜因果｜转折｜感受评价｜总结
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Why did it happen?（询问原因）
It happened because ___.（说明原因）
The reason was ___.（给出原因）
Since ___, we had to ___.（因果连接）
As a result, ___.（说明结果）
That caused ___.（造成影响）
It led to ___.（结果延伸）
We were late because ___.（生活因果）
The plan changed because ___.（计划变化）
If ___, we can ___.（条件判断）
I think the main cause was ___.（判断主因）
The result was better than expected.（正面结果）
The result was worse than expected.（负面结果）
We should fix ___ first.（处理问题）
Let’s avoid the same problem next time.（复盘改进）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: reason, cause, result, delay, mistake, schedule, cost, problem
Verbs: cause, lead to, change, delay, fix, avoid
Adjectives: late, early, busy, serious, unexpected
Time / Place: today, yesterday, tomorrow, next time
Chunks: as a result, because of, main cause, same problem
